```{r}
HP_GO_TP <- plot_grid(HP_GO_TP_UP$gtable, HP_GO_TP_DOWN$gtable, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","HP_GO_TP.png"), plot = HP_GO_TP, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```
![Heatmap: GOterms (Time Point)](Plots/HP_GO_TP.png)
### Life history stage
```{r}
#| label: revigo_heatmap_life_history_stage
#| echo: FALSE

HP_GO_LHS_UP <- heatmapPlot(SM_GO_LHS_UP,
                                  reduced_LHS_UP,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                 main = "Life history stage (Upregulated)")

HP_GO_LHS_DOWN <- heatmapPlot(SM_GO_LHS_DOWN,
                                  reduced_LHS_DOWN,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                  main = "Life history stage (Downregulated)")

HP_GO_LHS <- plot_grid(HP_GO_LHS_UP$gtable, HP_GO_LHS_DOWN$gtable, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","HP_GO_LHS.png"), plot = HP_GO_LHS, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 600)
```
![Heatmap: GOterms (Life history stage)](Plots/HP_GO_LHS.png)
### Interaction
```{r}
#| label: revigo_heatmap_interaction
#| echo: FALSE

HP_I_TP_MUM_DOWN <- heatmapPlot(SM_I_TP_MUM_DOWN,
                                  reduced_I_TP_MUM_DOWN,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                 main = "Interaction: Time point - Mothers (Downregulated)")

HP_I_TP_MUM_UP <- heatmapPlot(SM_I_TP_MUM_UP,
                                  reduced_I_TP_MUM_UP,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                  main = "Interaction: Time point - Mothers (Upregulated)")

HP_GO_I_TP_MUM <- plot_grid(HP_I_TP_MUM_UP$gtable, HP_I_TP_MUM_DOWN$gtable, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","HP_GO_I_TP_MUM.png"), plot = HP_GO_I_TP_MUM, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 600)

HP_I_TP_PUP_DOWN <- heatmapPlot(SM_I_TP_PUP_DOWN,
                                  reduced_I_TP_PUP_DOWN,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                 main = "Interaction: Time point - Pups (Downregulated)")

HP_I_TP_PUP_UP <- heatmapPlot(SM_I_TP_PUP_UP,
                                  reduced_I_TP_PUP_UP,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                  main = "Interaction: Time point - Pups (Upregulated)")

HP_GO_I_TP_PUP <- plot_grid(HP_I_TP_PUP_UP$gtable, HP_I_TP_PUP_DOWN$gtable, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","HP_GO_I_TP_PUP.png"), plot = HP_GO_I_TP_PUP, width = 7, height = 10, dpi = 600)

HP_I_I_UP <- heatmapPlot(SM_I_I_UP,
                                  reduced_I_I_UP,
                                  annotateParent=TRUE,
                                  annotationLabel="parentTerm",
                                  fontsize=6,
                                  main = "Interaction: Time point & life history stage (Upregulated)")

HP_I_I_UP_plot <- plot_grid(HP_I_I_UP$gtable)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","HP_I_I_UP_plot.png"), plot = HP_I_I_UP_plot, width = 9, height = 5, dpi = 600)
```

## Scatterplots
### Time point
```{r}
#| label: scatterplot_time_point
#| echo: FALSE
SP_GO_TP_UP <- scatterPlot(SM_GO_TP_UP, reduced_TP_UP, size = "score", addLabel = T, labelSize = 3) + 
  theme_classic() + 
  xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  xlab("Semantic space x") +
  ylab("Semantic space y") +
  ggtitle("Time point: downregulated") 

SP_GO_TP_DOWN <- scatterPlot(SM_GO_TP_DOWN, reduced_TP_DOWN, size = "score", addLabel = T, labelSize = 3) + 
  theme_classic() + 
  xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  xlab("Semantic space x") +
  ylab("Semantic space y") +
  ggtitle("Time point: downregulated") 

SP_TP_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_TP_UP + fig_theme, SP_GO_TP_DOWN+fig_theme)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","SP_TP_GO.png"), plot = SP_TP_GO, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 600)
```
![Semantic similarity of GOterms (Time point)](Plots/SP_TP_GO.png)
### Life history stage 
```{r}
#| label: scatterplot_life_history_stage
#| echo: FALSE

SP_GO_LHS_UP <- scatterPlot(SM_GO_LHS_UP, reduced_LHS_UP, size = "score", addLabel = T, labelSize = 3) + 
  theme_classic() + 
  xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  xlab("Semantic space x") +
  ylab("Semantic space y") +
  ggtitle("Life history stage: upregulated") 

SP_GO_LHS_DOWN <- scatterPlot(SM_GO_LHS_DOWN, reduced_LHS_DOWN, size = "score", addLabel = T, labelSize = 3) + 
  theme_classic() +
  xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
  ylim(c(-1,1)) +
  xlab("Semantic space x") +
  ylab("Semantic space y") +
  ggtitle("Life history stage: downregulated") 

SP_LHS_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_LHS_UP, SP_GO_LHS_DOWN)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","SP_LHS_GO.png"), plot = SP_LHS_GO, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 600)

fig_theme <- theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 14),
                   legend.title = element_blank(),
                   legend.text=element_text(size=12),
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size =12),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12))

SP_TP_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_TP_UP + 
                        theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) + fig_theme, 
                      SP_GO_TP_DOWN +fig_theme +
                        theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
                              axis.title.y = element_blank()))
SP_LHS_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_LHS_UP + fig_theme, 
                       SP_GO_LHS_DOWN + fig_theme + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()))
combined_SP <- plot_grid(SP_TP_GO, SP_LHS_GO, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","combined_SP.png"), plot = combined_SP, width = 7, height = 7, dpi = 600)
```
![Semantic similarity of GOterms (Life history stage)](Plots/SP_LHS_GO.png)

#### scatter plot with more flexibility
```{r}
#| label: scatterplot_manual
#| echo: FALSE
parent_colors <- c(
  "#FDA172",  # orange
  "#9867B5",  # purple
  "#8B9E58",  # olive green
  "#638B9B",  # teal
  "#C44B4E",  # deep red
  "#C46A00",  # rusty orange
  "#B58E36",  # golden brown
  "#6C75A9"   # muted blue-grey
)

# Function to generate semantic similarity scatter plot
plot_semantic_similarity <- function(simMatrix, reducedTerms, title_text, 
                                     parent_colors, xlim_val = c(-1.2, 1.2), ylim_val = c(-1.2, 1.2),
                                     point_alpha = 0.5, point_range = c(0, 20), label_size = 3.5,
                                     top_n = NULL, min_score = NULL, box_padding = 0.25) {
  
  # 1. Distance matrix
  dist_mat <- as.dist(1 - simMatrix)
  
  # 2. MDS
  mds <- cmdscale(dist_mat, eig = TRUE, k = 2)
  
  # 3. Build dataframe with metadata
  df <- as.data.frame(mds$points)
  df$go <- rownames(df)
  df <- merge(df, reducedTerms[, c("go", "term", "parent", "parentTerm", "score")],
              by = "go", all.x = TRUE)
  
  # 4.select top 5 most important parent terms
top_per_parent <- df %>%
  group_by(parent) %>%
  slice_max(score, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

top_parents <- top_per_parent %>%
  arrange(desc(score)) %>%
  slice(1:5) %>%   # top 5 parents
  pull(parent) 

label_data <- df %>%
  filter(parent %in% top_parents) %>%
  group_by(parentTerm) %>%
  summarise(
    V1 = mean(V1),
    V2 = mean(V2),
    score = max(score)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
  
  # 5. Filter top N or by minimum score if requested
  if(!is.null(top_n)) {
    label_data <- label_data %>% arrange(desc(score)) %>% slice(1:top_n)
  }
  if(!is.null(min_score)) {
    label_data <- label_data %>% filter(score >= min_score)
  }
  
  # 6. Plot
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = V1, y = V2, color = parentTerm)) +
    geom_point(aes(size = score), alpha = point_alpha) +
    scale_color_manual(values = parent_colors, guide = "none") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = point_range, guide = "none") +
    theme_classic() +
    xlim(xlim_val) +
    ylim(ylim_val) +
    xlab("Semantic space x") +
    ylab("Semantic space y") +
    ggtitle(title_text) +
    geom_label_repel(aes(label = parentTerm),
                     data = label_data,
                     force = 3,
                     box.padding = unit(box_padding, "lines"),
                     point.padding = unit(0.5, "lines"),
                     size = label_size,
                     max.overlaps = Inf)
  
  return(p)
}

# -------------------------------
# Example usage for your four datasets

SP_GO_TP_UP   <- plot_semantic_similarity(SM_GO_TP_UP, reduced_TP_UP, 
                                          "(a) Upregulated on day 60", parent_colors)
SP_GO_TP_DOWN <- plot_semantic_similarity(SM_GO_TP_DOWN, reduced_TP_DOWN, 
                                          "(b) Downregulated on day 60", parent_colors)
SP_GO_LHS_UP  <- plot_semantic_similarity(SM_GO_LHS_UP, reduced_LHS_UP, 
                                          "(c) Upregulated in mothers", parent_colors)
parent_colors <- c(
 "#FDA172", "#9867B5", "#8B9E58", "#4C6A92",
 "#C44B4E", "#C46A00", "#B58E36", "#6C75A9",
 "#A67C52", "#7A5E7E", "#5C8C6B", "#7289B0",
 "#D98C6D", "#8B6D92", "#B5A04C", "#587085",
 "#C4889F", "#74935E", "#9A7C5D", "#66778B", "#A37B9A")

SP_GO_LHS_DOWN <- plot_semantic_similarity(SM_GO_LHS_DOWN, reduced_LHS_DOWN, 
                                        "(d) Upregulated in pups", parent_colors, box_padding = 0.7)


SP_TP_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_TP_UP + 
                        theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()) + fig_theme, 
                      SP_GO_TP_DOWN + fig_theme + theme(axis.title = element_blank()), rel_widths = c(1.05, 1))
SP_LHS_GO <- plot_grid(SP_GO_LHS_UP + fig_theme, 
                       SP_GO_LHS_DOWN + fig_theme + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), ncol = 2, rel_widths = c(1.05, 1))
combined_SP <- plot_grid(SP_TP_GO, SP_LHS_GO, ncol = 1)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","combined_SP.png"), plot = combined_SP, width = 9, height = 9, dpi = 600)
```



### Interaction
```{r}
#| label: scatterplot_interaction
#| echo: FALSE


SP_I_TP_MUM_DOWN <- scatterPlot(SM_I_TP_MUM_DOWN,reduced_I_TP_MUM_DOWN) +  
                                theme_classic() + 
                                xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
                                ylim(c(-1,1)) +
                                xlab("Semantic space x") +
                                ylab("Semantic space y") +
                                ggtitle("Interaction: Time point - Mothers (Downregulated)")

SP_I_TP_MUM_UP <- scatterPlot(SM_I_TP_MUM_UP,reduced_I_TP_MUM_UP) +  
                                theme_classic() + 
                                xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
                                ylim(c(-1,1)) +
                                xlab("Semantic space x") +
                                ylab("Semantic space y") +
                                ggtitle("Interaction: Time point - Mothers (Upregulated)")

SP_GO_I_TP_MUM <- plot_grid(SP_I_TP_MUM_UP, SP_I_TP_MUM_DOWN)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","SP_GO_I_TP_MUM.png"), plot = SP_GO_I_TP_MUM, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 600)

SP_I_TP_PUP_DOWN <- scatterPlot(SM_I_TP_PUP_DOWN,reduced_I_TP_PUP_DOWN) +  
                                theme_classic() + 
                                xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
                                ylim(c(-1,1)) +
                                xlab("Semantic space x") +
                                ylab("Semantic space y") +
                                ggtitle("Interaction: Time point - Pups (Downregulated)")

SP_I_TP_PUP_UP <- scatterPlot(SM_I_TP_PUP_UP,reduced_I_TP_PUP_UP) +  
                                theme_classic() + 
                                xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
                                ylim(c(-1,1)) +
                                xlab("Semantic space x") +
                                ylab("Semantic space y") +
                                ggtitle("Interaction: Time point - Pups (Upregulated)")

SP_GO_I_TP_PUP <- plot_grid(SP_I_TP_PUP_UP, SP_I_TP_PUP_DOWN)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","SP_GO_I_TP_PUP.png"), plot = SP_GO_I_TP_PUP, width = 9, height = 4.5, dpi = 600)


SP_I_I_UP <- scatterPlot(SM_I_I_UP,reduced_I_I_UP) +  
                                theme_classic() + 
                                xlim(c(-1,1)) + 
                                ylim(c(-1,1)) +
                                xlab("Semantic space x") +
                                ylab("Semantic space y") +
                                ggtitle("Interaction: Time point & life history stage (Upregulated)")

SP_I_I_UP_plot <- plot_grid(SP_I_I_UP)
ggsave(here::here("Plots","SP_I_I_UP_plot.png"), plot = SP_I_I_UP_plot, width = 4.5, height = 4.5, dpi = 600)
```
